data.name: bronze
data.benefits: Discover games and manage a player profile.

data.name: silver
data.benefits: Priority access to selected community events.

data.name: gold
data.benefits: Enhanced community perks and event visibility.

data.name: goat
data.benefits: Exclusive PikaCircle benefits for elite players.

data.name: side_out
data.description: Traditional pickleball scoring. Only the serving team scores; doubles score calls include server number and conventionally start 0-0-2.

data.name: rally
data.description: Every rally winner scores a point. Doubles score calls use two numbers and do not include server number.

data.name: Qualified referral
data.description: Reward inviter when an accepted referral qualifies.

data.name: Join 5 hosted sessions
data.description: Reward players after five checked-in hosted sessions.
